notes: Phase-8 Session 10 (A3) SimulatedOMS slippage by symbol class. Values are MICROSTRUCTURE ESTIMATES — no observed slippage data exists yet (expected_price threading gap). Re-fit once Session-3 slippage tracker has ≥ 100 records per class. Classification: symbols ending in -USD are crypto; known futures roots (MCL, ES, GC, NQ and their micros MES/MNQ/MGC/M6E/ZB/ZN/SIL) are futures; everything else equity/ETF.
